basic_details.job_title: IIM Indore Office Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Indore (IIM Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Indore (IIM Indore) has released the official Office Associate Notification 2026 at the official website. Has been announced under the IIM Indore Office Associate Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Bachelor’s Degree can apply through email mode on or before 25 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Indore Office Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Office Associate position at IIM Indore is 25th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Office Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree to be eligible for the Office Associate position at IIM Indore.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIM Indore Office Associate recruitment must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the Office Associate role?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Office Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Office Associate role at IIM Indore will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Office Associate position at IIM Indore is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q7. Where is IIM Indore located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Indore is located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Madhya Pradesh apply?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions, so candidates from other states may be eligible, but it's best to check the official notification for any such clauses.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" description.
